text.title: Thumbs-Down to Eval — Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: 3 thumbs-down on same hallucination pattern within 90 min → stop-the-bleed fires → cluster admitted as eval row after triage.

example.title: Stop-the-bleed firing
example.code: { "cluster_id": "c-2026-05-22-001", "detected_at": "2026-05-22T14:32:00Z", "size": 3, "similarity_centroid": 0.91, "responses": [ {"interaction_id": "i-9001", "response_excerpt": "refund window is 60 days...", "signal": "down"}, {"interaction_id": "i-9018", "response_excerpt": "refunds available within 60-day...", "signal": "down"}, {"interaction_id": "i-9023", "response_excerpt": "you have 60 days to request a refund...", "signal": "down"} ], "ground_truth": "actual refund policy is 30 days", "action": "stop-the-bleed alert sent to ml-ops@example.com; ship gate flipped for intent=policy-lookup", "resolution": "found stale doc in vector index; re-embedded policy/refunds.md within 30min", "eval_admission": { "candidate_id": "ec-c-2026-05-22-001", "judge_votes": ["ADMIT", "ADMIT", "ADMIT"], "pii_clean": true, "admitted_this_week": 12, "weekly_cap_remaining": 38, "admit_decision": "ADMIT" } }
example.note: Demonstrates: (a) cluster fires after 3 same-pattern downs (r5), (b) triple-judge unanimous ADMIT (r3), (c) PII-clean gate passed (r2), (d) within weekly cap (r4), (e) all four pipeline stages ran (r1).
